title: kosteletzkya wetarensis
intro: Kosteletzkya wetarensis, also known as the Wetar Coast Sea Hibiscus or Coast Hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Kosteletzkya wetarensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
